settings.title: Settings
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
settings.logoHint: Your school logo appears in the header and on login pages.
settings.logoFormats: PNG, JPG, SVG or WebP · Max 5 MB
settings.coloursDescription: Set your school's primary and secondary brand colours.
settings.inquiryStaleHoursDesc: Mark admissions inquiries as stale after this many hours without response.
settings.pendingAlertTimeHourDesc: Hour (0–23) when pending attendance alerts are sent.
settings.workDaysDesc: Select the days when school is in session. Attendance sessions can only be created on work days.
settings.requireGradeComment: Require comment when entering a grade
settings.defaultPaymentTermDaysDesc: Number of days before invoice is due.
settings.defaultBonusMultiplierDesc: Multiplier applied to base salary for bonus calculations.
settings.schedulingRequireApproval: Require approval for non-principal schedule changes
settings.teacherWeeklyMaxPeriodsDesc: Global cap on teaching periods per week (overrides individual config).
settings.maxSolverDurationSecondsDesc: Time limit for the scheduling solver before it stops.
settings.approvalsExpiryDaysDesc: Approvals expire after this many days if not actioned.
settings.approvalsReminderAfterHoursDesc: Send a reminder if approval is pending after this many hours.
settings.auditLogRetentionMonthsDesc: How long audit logs are retained.
settings.stripeDescription: Connect Stripe to enable online payments for school fees.
settings.stripeConfiguredDesc: Your Stripe keys are stored securely. Only the last 4 characters are shown.
settings.stripeUpdateWarning: Updating these keys will replace your current Stripe configuration. Ensure you have the correct keys before saving.
settings.stripeSecretKeyHint: Starts with sk_live_ or sk_test_. Never shared publicly.
settings.stripePublishableKeyHint: Starts with pk_live_ or pk_test_. Safe to expose to the browser.
settings.stripeWebhookSecretHint: Starts with whsec_. Found in your Stripe webhook settings.
settings.stripeAllFieldsRequired: All three Stripe keys are required.
settings.stripeSecurityNote: All Stripe keys are encrypted at rest using AES-256. Only the last 4 characters are shown after saving.
settings.notificationsDescription: Control which notifications are sent and through which channels.
settings.notifNoSettings: No notification settings found. They will appear once the tenant is initialised.
settings.notifChannelsHint: Channel options are only available when a notification type is enabled.
settings.gradingWeightsDescription: Define how much each assessment category counts toward the final grade, per year group and term.
settings.selectYearGroupPrompt: Select a year group to configure grading weights.
settings.copyWeightsDescription: Copy all term weight configurations from the current year group to another.
settings.defaultPresentDescription: Pre-mark all students as present when a session is created. Teachers only mark exceptions.
settings.notifyParentOnAbsenceDescription: Send an immediate notification to parents when their child is marked absent, late, or left early.
settings.patternDetectionDescription: Automatically detect attendance patterns like excessive absences, recurring day absences, and chronic tardiness.
settings.parentNotificationAutoDescription: Notify parents immediately when a pattern is detected
settings.parentNotificationManualDescription: Staff reviews patterns and manually notifies parents
settings.aiDescription: AI-powered features for attendance and school operations.
settings.aiEnabledDescription: Enable AI-powered features such as handwritten attendance scanning.
settings.formativeWeightCapDesc: Maximum percentage that formative assessments can contribute to the final grade. Leave blank for no cap.
settings.formativeIncludedInPeriodGradeDesc: If disabled, formative assessments are excluded from period grade calculations entirely.
settings.gpaPrecisionDesc: Number of decimal places for GPA display.
settings.gpaScaleLabelDesc: Label shown next to the GPA value (e.g. GPA, CGPA).
settings.atRiskDetectionDesc: Automatically detect students at risk of academic difficulty.
settings.gradingConsistencyThresholdDesc: Flag when a teacher's average grade deviates by more than this percentage from the subject mean.
settings.requireApprovalForMarkingSchemesDesc: If enabled, uploaded AI marking schemes require admin approval before use.
settings.aiCommentStyleDesc: Tone for AI-generated report card comments.
settings.aiCommentSampleReferenceDesc: Provide an example comment to guide the AI style.
settings.aiCommentTargetWordCountDesc: Approximate word count for AI-generated comments.
settings.aiProgressSummariesEnabledDesc: Show AI-generated performance summaries on the parent portal.
settings.aiGradingDailyLimitDesc: Maximum number of AI-assisted gradings per day across this tenant.
settings.reportCardTemplatesDesc: Customise report card layouts with section-based design and style presets.
settings.customFieldsDesc: Define custom fields that appear on report cards.
settings.sectionReportCardsDesc: Configure report card workflow, delivery, and feature settings.
settings.rcApprovalConfigDesc: Which approval pipeline is used before publishing report cards.
settings.rcAutoDeliveryDesc: Automatically deliver report cards to parents when published.
settings.rcShowComparativeLabelDesc: Display a label indicating the student's standing relative to class.
settings.rcShowPercentileDesc: Show the student's percentile rank per subject.
settings.rcShowTopThreeRankDesc: Only show class rank for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd position students.
settings.rcRequireAcknowledgmentDesc: Parents must confirm receipt of report cards.
settings.rcAcknowledgmentReminderDaysDesc: Send reminder if not acknowledged within this many days.
settings.rcAutoGenerateEnabledDesc: Automatically generate draft report cards when an academic period ends.
settings.rcAutoGenerateDaysAfterPeriodEndDesc: Generate drafts this many days after the period end date.
settings.schedulingSubstitutionDesc: Configure how urgent teacher absences are handled.
settings.autoAssignUrgentSubstitutionsDesc: Automatically assign the top-ranked substitute for same-day urgent absences.
settings.urgentThresholdMinutesDesc: Absences reported within this many minutes of period start are treated as urgent.
settings.schedulingNotificationsDesc: Notify teachers when their schedule changes.
settings.financeRemindersDesc: Automatically send reminders to parents about upcoming and overdue invoices
settings.dueSoonReminderDaysDesc: Send a reminder when an invoice is due within this many days
settings.finalNoticeAfterDaysDesc: Send a final notice when an invoice is overdue by this many days
settings.autoIssueRecurringInvoicesDesc: When enabled, auto-generated recurring invoices are immediately issued (not created as drafts)
settings.lateFeeEnabledDesc: Automatically apply late fees to overdue invoices based on the configured rules
settings.payrollCalendarDesc: Configure pay date and preparation lead time.
settings.payDayDesc: Day of the month when staff are paid (1–28).
settings.payrollPreparationLeadDaysDesc: How many days before pay day to start preparation.
settings.autoCreatePayrollDesc: Automatically create a draft payroll run each month.
settings.autoCreateRunDayDesc: Day of the month to automatically create the draft run (1–28).
settings.accountantExportDesc: Configure export settings for your accounting team.
settings.payrollAccountantEmailDesc: Email address to send payroll exports to.
settings.payslipDeliveryDesc: Configure how payslips are delivered to staff.
settings.autoSendPayslipsDesc: Automatically send payslips to staff when a run is finalised.

reports.allergyReportDesc: List of students with recorded allergies.
reports.householdStatementDesc: Financial statement with balances per household.
reports.payrollReportsDesc: Cost trends, YTD summaries and bonus analysis.
reports.noData: No data available for the selected criteria.
reports.noPromotionData: No promotion data available for the selected academic year.
reports.selectDateRangeDescription: Choose start and end dates to view the report.
reports.searchStudentPlaceholder: Search by name or student number...
reports.searchToExportDescription: Search for a student by name or number to generate an export pack.

analytics.aiSummaryHint: Click Summarise to generate an AI narrative of this report.
analytics.aiSummaryFallback: School-wide attendance is strong at 93%. Collection rate improved 5 points this term. At-risk student count has decreased month-over-month.

insights.title: Cross-Module Insights
insights.findingAttendanceGrades: Students with attendance below 85% average 12% lower grades. 7 students in this cohort are at high risk.
insights.findingCostPerStudent: Cost per student has decreased from 420 to 408 over the last 6 months as enrolment grew.
insights.findingYearGroupHealth: Year 12 has the highest composite health score (88). Year 7 needs attention with a score of 68.
insights.findingTeacherEffectiveness: Ms. Khalil leads on marking compliance (98%) and student outcomes. Mr. Ibrahim's classes show lower attendance — consider intervention.

attendance.title: Attendance Analytics
attendance.description: Deep-dive attendance metrics across classes, teachers and time periods.
attendance.heatmapTitle: Attendance Heatmap — Year Group × Day of Week
attendance.aiSummaryFallback: School-wide attendance is 93.2% this term. Year 8 has the lowest rate at 88.4%, driven by 5 students with chronic absenteeism. Wednesday consistently shows 2-3% lower attendance across all year groups.

grades.title: Grade Analytics
grades.description: Pass rates, distributions, performer rankings and trend analysis.
grades.subject: Subject
grades.aiSummaryFallback: School-wide pass rate improved to 82% this term. Physics remains the hardest subject at 64% average. Top performers are consistently in Year 12.

demographics.title: Student Demographics
demographics.description: Enrolment composition, trends and capacity analysis.
demographics.aiSummaryFallback: 195 active students across 5 year groups. Year 10 is at capacity (100%). 18 nationalities represented — 52% Libyan. Net enrolment trend is positive with 23 new students vs 5 withdrawals this term.

studentProgress.title: Student Progress Tracker
studentProgress.description: Track individual student trajectory across grades, attendance and alerts.
studentProgress.selectStudentDesc: Search for a student above to view their full progress profile.
studentProgress.noAlerts: No alerts recorded for this student.
studentProgress.aiSummaryFallback: has improved consistently across all subjects this term. Attendance rebounded to 94% in March after a dip in December. No active at-risk flags.

admissions.title: Admissions Funnel
admissions.description: Pipeline analysis, conversion rates and processing times.
admissions.aiSummaryFallback: 84 applications received this cycle. Overall enrolment conversion is 29%. Processing time has improved from 14 to 7 days. Year 7 receives the most applications.

staff.title: Staff Analytics
staff.description: Headcount, ratios, tenure, qualifications and compensation.
staff.attendanceNote: Staff attendance data is sourced from the staff attendance tracker. Connect to see live data.
staff.aiSummaryFallback: 45 active staff across 6 departments. Staff-to-student ratio is 1:4.4. 2 subjects (Physics, History) have qualification gaps. Majority of staff (62%) have 2–10 years tenure.

board.title: Board Report Generator
board.description: Generate termly or annual reports for school board governance.

operatingRules.concern: A concern is one observation or disclosure at a point in time. Log it even when you only need the record preserved.
operatingRules.case: A case is opened when concerns need coordinated ownership, review dates, and support actions.
operatingRules.review: Show operational facts, chronology, and review prompts. Do not turn the workspace into a machine-authored risk screen.

survey.title: Staff Survey
survey.noActiveSurvey: There are no active surveys at the moment. You'll be notified when a new survey opens.
survey.anonymityExplanation: Your response is anonymous. We store no information that could identify you — not your name, not your account, not even the time you submitted. Results are only released after the survey closes.
survey.anonymityDetail: Your participation is verified using a one-way mathematical token that confirms you're a staff member without recording who you are. This token is automatically deleted 7 days after the survey closes. After that, even the system itself cannot determine who participated.
survey.confirmMessage: Once submitted, your response cannot be changed or withdrawn. Continue?
survey.freeformWarning: Avoid names or details that could identify you or others. Your response is anonymous — help keep it that way.
survey.thankYouDetail: Your anonymous feedback has been recorded.
survey.resultsAvailable: Results will be available after the survey closes on {date}.
survey.alreadyResponded: You have already submitted a response to this survey.
survey.surveyClosed: This survey is no longer accepting responses.

smallSchool.message: Your school has {count} staff members. Survey results will only appear when at least {threshold} staff respond. Department-level insights require departments with at least {deptThreshold} members.

dashboard.title: Wellbeing Dashboard
dashboard.coverFairnessAdvice: If this shows significant concentration, consider reviewing how cover duties are assigned.
dashboard.timetableAdvice: These metrics reflect timetable structure. Improvements typically require timetable restructuring at the planning stage.
dashboard.pressureCorrelation: High substitution pressure often correlates with increased staff absence in following months.
dashboard.correlationExplanation: This analysis needs at least 12 months of data to show meaningful patterns.
dashboard.correlationDisclaimer: This shows patterns that occurred together. It does not prove that one caused the other. Use this as a starting point for investigation, not a conclusion.

surveys.title: Survey Management
surveys.noSurveys: No surveys yet. Create your first survey to start gathering staff feedback.
surveys.activateConfirm: Activate this survey? Staff will be notified and can start responding.
surveys.closeConfirm: Close this survey? No more responses will be accepted.

surveyDetail.title: Survey Detail
surveyDetail.anonymityNote: These results are aggregate. Individual responses cannot be traced to any staff member. Free-text responses have been reviewed for identifying information.
surveyDetail.belowThreshold: This department does not have enough responses to display results. A minimum of {threshold} responses is required to protect anonymity.
surveyDetail.filterBlocked: Applying this filter would reduce the result set below the minimum threshold required to protect anonymity.
surveyDetail.redactConfirm: This will permanently replace the response text. The original text cannot be recovered. Continue?
surveyDetail.surveyActive: This survey is still active. Results will be available after it closes.
surveyDetail.activateConfirm: Activate this survey? Staff will be notified and can start responding.
surveyDetail.closeConfirm: Close this survey? No more responses will be accepted.

reports.title: Board Wellbeing Report
reports.printFallback: Use your browser's print function to save as PDF.
